prompt:
Estimate the total calories, saturated fat (in grams), and protein (in grams) for this full day of eating. Give your final answer as three numbers.

- Venti Starbucks shaken espresso with protein milk
- Egg white breakfast sandwich
- 3 soy breakfast sausages
- English muffin with peanut butter
- Serving of cottage cheese with honey
- 4 McCrispy strips
- Hot mustard sauce
- Can of green beans with cheese and wheat germ
- Protein peanut butter cups
- Apple
- Decaf coffee with soy milk x2

criteria.description: The calorie estimate is between 1800 and 2200 (within 10% of the true value of 2000 calories). Look for the number the model gives as its final calorie total and check if it falls in this range.
The saturated fat estimate is between 26.1g and 31.9g (within 10% of the true value of 29g). Look for the number the model gives as its final saturated fat total and check if it falls in this range.
The protein estimate is between 112.5g and 137.5g (within 10% of the true value of 125g). Look for the number the model gives as its final protein total and check if it falls in this range.

metadata.notes: True values: 2000 cal, 29g sat fat, 125g protein. Tolerance: +/- 10%.
